prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SHARPENINGSTONES-7PC Product Type: KNIFE_SHARPENER Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool Set of 6, 180 Grit Sharpening Stone Rods, 6 Inch Assorted Shapes Various Sizes Description: Keep your knives and blades sharp with the Universal Tool 6pc Sharpening Stone Set.

This set comes with 6 different sharpening stones in a variety of sizes, all with a 180 grit. The green sticks are constructed of silicon carbide, with each bench shapening stone a different shape, so this set will ensure you have the correct sharpener for the job.

The different shapes (square, rectangle, half circle and triangle) will allow you to sharpen most utility knives and blades. This is a must have set for hobbiests, DIYers and knife fanatics. Search Terms: whetstone bench sharpening stones coarse grit knife sharpener blade sharpening stones sharpen care Features: - Universal Tool Knife and Blade Sharpener Set - 6 Pieces - ASSORTED TYPES OF SHAPES - A variety of choices in the shapes of your stone allows you to make the right choice for any type of tool, whether it is semicircular, rectangular, square or triangular - 3 Green Silicon Carbide Sticks - Circle: 1/2" Triangle: 1/2" - 3 Green Silicon Carbide Sticks - Square: 5/8" Rectangle: 1/2" Half Circle: 5/8" - Specifications: 180 Grit Length: 6" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 6-Piece 6 Inch Sharpening Stone Set
